chat.messageCopied: メッセージをクリップボードにコピーしました

chat.userLoadError: Unable to load this conversation. The user may no longer exist.
chat.channelNotFoundDesc: This channel or page does not exist or has been deleted.
chat.theyBlockedYou: You cannot send messages to this user until they unblock you.
chat.attachTooltip: Attach a file (image, PDF, DOCX… <10 MB)
chat.e2eeTooltip: End-to-end encryption (Signal Protocol) — the server cannot read your messages
chat.e2eeOffline: Your contact is offline. Try again when they are connected.
chat.e2eeMissing: Some messages could not be decrypted. Ask your contact to share the history.
chat.groupStart: This is the beginning of your group conversation. Send a message to get started!
